{"cards": [{"name": "Blazing Ultimatum", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Target creature gains haste and +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": ""Fire answers every question with the same solution." —Keral, pyromancer", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal red rare instant with classic red effects: burn, artifact destruction, and temporary combat boost. The 'choose two' format makes it flexible and powerful enough for rare. All three modes are solidly in red's color pie. Cost reflects the flexibility of getting two effects."}, {"name": "The Verdant Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
III — Creatures you control get +2/+2 and trample until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Green saga focusing on ramp, +1/+1 counters, and combat enhancement - all core green mechanics. Chapter I provides mana fixing, II builds board presence, III delivers a powerful finisher. The progression from setup to payoff fits saga design philosophy and green's ramp-into-threats strategy."}, {"name": "Crystal Caverns", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Deep beneath the mountains, ancient crystals hold memories of ages past.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Colorless utility land that enters tapped to balance the scry ability. The scry 1 for {2} + tap is costed appropriately for an uncommon land - useful but not overpowered. Provides colorless mana and card selection utility."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Where ancient oaks whisper secrets to those who know how to listen.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Standard basic Forest with evocative flavor text. Basic lands are always common and have the standard mana ability. The flavor suggests the mystical, natural wisdom associated with green mana and forest environments."}]}
